Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
The universal property of the Rezk completion states, 1-dimensionally, that every functor F into a univalent category factors (uniquely) through the Rezk completion.
The unique functor out of the Rezk completion is referred to as ``the lift of F''.
The contents in this file conclude that if F preserves pullbacks, then so does its lift.

In [weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_pullbacks], we show the following:
Assume F preserves all pullbacks in its domain.
Then, all equalizers in the codomain (the Rezk completion) are preserved by the lift.

In [weak_equiv_lifts_preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq], we show the following:
Assume the involved categories have chosen pullbacks.
If F preserves the chosen pullbacks up to (propositional) equality, then so does it lift.
 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Reflection.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Preservation.Pullbacks.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesPullbacks.

  Context {C1 : category}
    (C2 C3 : univalent_category)
    {F : C1 ⟶ C3}
    {G : C1 ⟶ C2}
    {H : C2 ⟶ C3}
    (α : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F)
    (Gw : is_weak_equiv G)
    (Fpb : preserves_pullback F).

  (* In this section, we show: preserves_pullback H *)

  Section LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesEqualizers_subproofs.

    Context {y1 y2 py' py : C2}
      {fy : C2⟦y1, py'⟧}
      {gy : C2 ⟦y2, py'⟧}
      {π₁y : C2 ⟦py, y1⟧}
      {π₂y : C2⟦py, y2⟧}
      {q : π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy}
      {Fq : # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy}
      (ispby : isPullback q)
      {x1 x2 px px' : C1}
      (i1 : z_iso (G x1) y1)
      (i2 : z_iso (G x2) y2)
      (i : z_iso (G px) py)
      (i' : z_iso (G px') py').

    Let PB := (make_Pullback q ispby : Pullback fy gy).
    Let π₁x := ((fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv _ Gw)) _ _ (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1)).
    Let π₂x := ((fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv _ Gw)) _ _ (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2)).
    Let fx := ((fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv _ Gw)) _ _ (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i')).
    Let gx := ((fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv _ Gw)) _ _ (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i')).

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁x · fx = π₂x · gx

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁x · fx = π₂x · gx

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px x1
  (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1)
· fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x1
    px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i') =
fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px x2
  (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2)
· fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x2
    px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px
  px'
  (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i')) =
fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px
  px'
  (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'))

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i') =
i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i')

fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i
· (π₁y · (z_iso_inv i1 · (i1 · (fy · z_iso_inv i')))) =
i
· (π₂y · (z_iso_inv i2 · (i2 · (gy · z_iso_inv i'))))

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · (z_iso_inv i1 · (i1 · (fy · z_iso_inv i'))) =
π₂y · (z_iso_inv i2 · (i2 · (gy · z_iso_inv i')))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i' =
π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'

PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 · fy =
π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · i2 · gy

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 · fy = π₁y · fy
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₂y · gy = π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · i2 · gy

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 · fy = π₁y · fy
 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 = π₁y

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 = π₁y · identity y1

y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy

ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_inv i1 · i1 = identity y1

        apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.

G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
identity y2 = z_iso_inv i2 · i2

        apply pathsinv0, z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
    Qed.

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'

i1 · fy = # G fx · i'

y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i1 · fy =
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x1
     px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i')) · i'

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i1 · fy = i1 · (fy · (z_iso_inv i' · i'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
fy = fy · (z_iso_inv i' · i')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
fy · identity py' = fy · (z_iso_inv i' · i')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_inv i' · i' = identity py'

      apply (pr2 i').
    Qed.

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i2 · gy = # G gx · i'

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i2 · gy =
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x2
     px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i')) · i'

H: C2 ⟶ C3

fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i2 · gy = i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i' · i'

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_inv i' · i' = identity py'

      apply (pr2 i').
    Qed.

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y = # G π₁x · i1

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y = # G π₁x · i1

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y =
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px
     x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1)) · i1

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_inv i2 · i2 = identity y2

      apply (pr2 i2).
    Qed.

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
isPullback
  fully_faithful_inv_hom_of_pullback_diagram_commutes

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3

H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy

?i_x · fy = # G fx · ?i_z

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso (G x1) y1
 exact i1.

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso (G px') py'
 exact i'.
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso (G px) py
 exact i.

F: C1 ⟶ C3

H: C2 ⟶ C3

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i1 · fy = # G fx · i'
 exact inv_of_pullback_leg_fy_commutes_with_image_modulo_isos.

# G π₂x · i2 = i · π₂y
 exact inv_of_pullback_second_projection_commutes_with_image_modulo_isos.

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H (inv_from_z_iso i1)
· (# (G ∙ H) fx · (pr11 α) px') =
# H fy · (# H (inv_from_z_iso i') · pr1 α px')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H (inv_from_z_iso i1)
· (# H (# G fx) · (pr11 α) px') =
# H fy · (# H (inv_from_z_iso i') · pr1 α px')

y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy

ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i1 · # G fx = fy · inv_from_z_iso i'

F: C1 ⟶ C3

fy = inv_from_z_iso i1 · # G fx · i'

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# G fx · i' = i1 · fy

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧

ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x1
     px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i')) · i' = i1 · fy

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧

i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?b = i1 · fy

PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i1 · fy · (z_iso_inv i' · i') = ?b
 do 2 apply maponpaths, (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i'). 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i1 · fy · identity py' = i1 · fy

      apply id_right.
    Qed.

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i2 · # G gx = gy · inv_from_z_iso i'

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
gy = inv_from_z_iso i2 · # G gx · i'

H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧

π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'

gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
inv_from_z_iso i2 · (# G gx · i') = gy

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x2
     px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i')) · i' = i2 · gy

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?b = i2 · gy
 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i2 · gy · (z_iso_inv i' · i') = ?b
 do 2 apply maponpaths, (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i'). 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i2 · gy · identity py' = i2 · gy

      apply id_right.
    Qed.

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H (inv_from_z_iso i) · pr1 α px · # F π₁x =
# H π₁y · (# H (inv_from_z_iso i1) · pr1 α x1)

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px
     x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1)) · i1 = i · π₁y

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1 · i1 = i · π₁y

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

Fpb: preserves_pullback F

gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · (z_iso_inv i1 · i1) = i · π₁y

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · (z_iso_inv i1 · i1) = ?b
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?b = i · π₁y
 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · (z_iso_inv i1 · i1) = ?b
 do 2 apply maponpaths, (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i1). 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₁y · identity y1 = i · π₁y

      apply id_right.
    Qed.

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H π₂y · (# H (inv_from_z_iso i2) · pr1 α x2) =
# H (inv_from_z_iso i) · pr1 α px · # F π₂x

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2

fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧

# H (inv_from_z_iso i) · (pr1 α px · # F π₂x)

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?b = # H (inv_from_z_iso i) · (pr1 α px · # F π₂x)

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

Fpb: preserves_pullback F

Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q

i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'

  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧

  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧

# G π₂x · i2 = i · π₂y

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# G
  (fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) px
     x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2)) · i2 = i · π₂y

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2 · i2 = i · π₂y

gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧

      apply id_right.
    Qed.

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?i_y · # F gx = # H gy · ?i_z
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
?i_p · # F π₁x = # H π₁y · ?i_x
C1: category

F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2

ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2

i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H π₂y · ?i_y = ?i_p · # F π₂x

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso (H y1) (F x1)
 exact (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i1)) (_ ,, pr2 α _)).

 exact (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i)) (_ ,, pr2 α _)).
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i1))
  (pr1 α x1,, pr2 α x1) · # F fx =
# H fy
· z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i'))
    (pr1 α px',, pr2 α px')
 exact images_of_fully_faithful_inv_hom_of_leg_commute₀.
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3

α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧

  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i2))
  (pr1 α x2,, pr2 α x2) · # F gx =
# H gy
· z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i'))
    (pr1 α px',, pr2 α px')
 exact images_of_fully_faithful_inv_hom_of_leg_commute₁.
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i))
  (pr1 α px,, pr2 α px) · # F π₁x =
# H π₁y
· z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i1))
    (pr1 α x1,, pr2 α x1)
 exact images_of_fully_faithful_inv_hom_of_first_projection_commute.
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
x1, x2, px, px': C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
i: z_iso (G px) py
i': z_iso (G px') py'
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
π₁x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x1 (i · π₁y · z_iso_inv i1): C1 ⟦ px, x1 ⟧
π₂x:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  px x2 (i · π₂y · z_iso_inv i2): C1 ⟦ px, x2 ⟧
fx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x1 px' (i1 · fy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x1, px' ⟧
gx:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw)
  x2 px' (i2 · gy · z_iso_inv i'): C1 ⟦ x2, px' ⟧
# H π₂y
· z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i2))
    (pr1 α x2,, pr2 α x2) =
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso H (z_iso_inv i))
  (pr1 α px,, pr2 α px) · # F π₂x
 exact images_of_fully_faithful_inv_hom_of_second_projection_commute.
    Defined.

  End LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesEqualizers_subproofs.

  
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
preserves_pullback H

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3

H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
preserves_pullback H

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
isPullback Fq

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
isPullback Fq


    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
isaprop (isPullback Fq)
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
(∑ a : C1, z_iso (G a) y1) → isPullback Fq

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
isaprop (isPullback Fq)
 apply isaprop_isPullback. 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
(∑ a : C1, z_iso (G a) y1) → isPullback Fq

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
x1: C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
isPullback Fq

G: C1 ⟶ C2

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
x1: C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
isaprop (isPullback Fq)

H: C2 ⟶ C3

Gw: is_weak_equiv G

fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧

q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy

PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_pullback F
y1, y2, py', py: C2
fy: C2 ⟦ y1, py' ⟧
gy: C2 ⟦ y2, py' ⟧
π₁y: C2 ⟦ py, y1 ⟧
π₂y: C2 ⟦ py, y2 ⟧
q: π₁y · fy = π₂y · gy
Fq: # H π₁y · # H fy = # H π₂y · # H gy
ispby: isPullback q
PB:= make_Pullback q ispby: Pullback fy gy
x1: C1
i1: z_iso (G x1) y1
x2: C1
i2: z_iso (G x2) y2
px: C1
i: z_iso (G px) py
px': C1
i': z_iso (G px') py'
isPullback Fq


    exact (pullback_is_preserved_after_lift ispby i1 i2 i i').
  Qed.

End LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesPullbacks.

Section LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesChosenPullbacksUptoEquality.

  Context {C1 : category}
    (C2 C3 : univalent_category)
    {F : C1 ⟶ C3}
    {G : C1 ⟶ C2}
    {H : C2 ⟶ C3}
    (α : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F)
    (P₁ : Pullbacks C1)
    (P₂ : Pullbacks (pr1 C2))
    (P₃ : Pullbacks (pr1 C3))
    (Gw : is_weak_equiv G)
    (Fpb : preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃).

  Section LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesChosenPullbacksUptoEqualityAfterInduction.

    Context {x y z : C1}
      (f' : C2⟦G x, G z⟧)
      (g' : C2⟦G y, G z⟧).

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
     P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f')
       (# H g') ∥)
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
    P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')
  ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
     P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f')
       (# H g') ∥)
 apply isapropishinh. 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
→ ∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
    P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')
  ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w:= weak_equiv_preserves_pullbacks_eq Gw (pr2 C2) P₁ P₂
  x y z f g: ∥ G (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g) ∥
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w:= weak_equiv_preserves_pullbacks_eq Gw (pr2 C2) P₁ P₂
  x y z f g: ∥ G (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g) ∥
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
     P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f')
       (# H g') ∥)
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w:= weak_equiv_preserves_pullbacks_eq Gw (pr2 C2) P₁ P₂
  x y z f g: ∥ G (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g) ∥
G (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g)
→ ∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
    P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')
  ∥

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)

x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧

w:= weak_equiv_preserves_pullbacks_eq Gw (pr2 C2) P₁ P₂
  x y z f g: ∥ G (P₁ z x y f g) =
  P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g) ∥
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
     P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f')
       (# H g') ∥)
 apply isapropishinh.

  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G

x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g)
# G f = f'
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

C2, C3: univalent_category

P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)

Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g)
# G f = f'

        unfold f ; now rewrite functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.

f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3

P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) (# G f) (# G g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' (# G g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
