P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') = ?b
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
?b =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')
 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') = ?b

        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g' = ?t2

        exact (! w).
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
w: G (P₁ z x y f g) = P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g'
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (G (P₁ z x y f g)) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
H (G (P₁ z x y f g)) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
H (G (P₁ z x y f g)) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
H (G (P₁ z x y f g)) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g) =
P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g')


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))

      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
z_iso (P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g))
  (P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g'))


      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso ψ₁ · # F f · idtoiso ψ₃ = # H f'
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso ψ₂ · # F g · idtoiso ψ₃ = # H g'

  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧

  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =

pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))

ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso (isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁) · # F f
· idtoiso (isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃) = # H (# G f)

x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))

ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
ϕ₁ · # F f · ϕ₃ = ?b

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3

P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)

Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =

pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))

ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)

ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
?b = # H (# G f)

Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =

pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))

ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
ϕ₁ · # F f = ?y'

          exact (! pr21 α _ _ _).
        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
# (G ∙ H) f · (pr11 α) z · ϕ₃ = # H (# G f)

        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
# (G ∙ H) f · (pr11 α) z =
# H (# G f) · inv_from_z_iso ϕ₃

        apply idpath.
      
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso ψ₂ · # F g · idtoiso ψ₃ = # H g'
 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso ψ₂ · # F g · idtoiso ψ₃ = # H (# G g)

        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F

P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)

Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
idtoiso (isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂) · # F g
· idtoiso (isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃) = # H (# G g)

f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =

pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))

ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
ϕ₂ · # F g · ϕ₃ = ?b

  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧

C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
ϕ₂ · # F g = ?y'

          exact (! pr21 α _ _ _).
        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
# (G ∙ H) g · (pr11 α) z · ϕ₃ = # H (# G g)

        
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x, y, z: C1
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
f:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) x
  z f': C1 ⟦ x, z ⟧
g:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (ff_from_weak_equiv G Gw) y
  z g': C1 ⟦ y, z ⟧
v: F (P₁ z x y f g) =
P₃ (F z) (F x) (F y) (# F f) (# F g)
pf_f: # G f = f'
pf_g: # G g = g'
ϕ₄:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α (P₁ z x y f g): z_iso ((G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g)) (F (P₁ z x y f g))
ψ:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₄: (G ∙ H) (P₁ z x y f g) = F (P₁ z x y f g)
ϕ₁:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α x: z_iso ((G ∙ H) x) (F x)
ϕ₂:= nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α y: z_iso ((G ∙ H) y) (F y)
ϕ₃:= z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso α z): z_iso (F z) ((G ∙ H) z)
ψ₁:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₁: (G ∙ H) x = F x
ψ₂:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₂: (G ∙ H) y = F y
ψ₃:= isotoid (pr1 C3) (pr2 C3) ϕ₃: F z = (G ∙ H) z
# (G ∙ H) g · (pr11 α) z =
# H (# G g) · inv_from_z_iso ϕ₃

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

  End LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesChosenPullbacksUptoEqualityAfterInduction.

  
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq H P₂ P₃

  
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq H P₂ P₃

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
  P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥


    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
     P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥)
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
(∑ a : C1, z_iso (G a) x')
→ ∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
    P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
isaprop
  (∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
     P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥)
 apply isapropishinh. 
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
(∑ a : C1, z_iso (G a) x')
→ ∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
    P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) x'
∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
  P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥

P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) x'
isaprop

     P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥)

C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2

P₁: Pullbacks C1

Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) x'
y: C1
iy: z_iso (G y) y'
(∑ a : C1, z_iso (G a) z')
→ ∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
    P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x', y', z': C2
f': C2 ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) x'
y: C1
iy: z_iso (G y) y'
z: C1
iz: z_iso (G z) z'
∥ H (P₂ z' x' y' f' g') =
  P₃ (H z') (H x') (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥


    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
y', z': C2
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) (G x)
f': C2 ⟦ G x, z' ⟧
g': C2 ⟦ y', z' ⟧
y: C1
iy: z_iso (G y) y'
z: C1
iz: z_iso (G z) z'
∥ H (P₂ z' (G x) y' f' g') =
  P₃ (H z') (H (G x)) (H y') (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
z': C2
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) (G x)
f': C2 ⟦ G x, z' ⟧
y: C1
iy: z_iso (G y) (G y)
g': C2 ⟦ G y, z' ⟧
z: C1
iz: z_iso (G z) z'
∥ H (P₂ z' (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H z') (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥

    
C1: category
C2, C3: univalent_category
F: C1 ⟶ C3
G: C1 ⟶ C2
H: C2 ⟶ C3
α: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) F
P₁: Pullbacks C1
P₂: Pullbacks (pr1 C2)
P₃: Pullbacks (pr1 C3)
Gw: is_weak_equiv G
Fpb: preserves_chosen_pullbacks_eq F P₁ P₃
x: C1
ix: z_iso (G x) (G x)
z: C1
iz: z_iso (G z) (G z)
f': C2 ⟦ G x, G z ⟧
y: C1
iy: z_iso (G y) (G y)
g': C2 ⟦ G y, G z ⟧
∥ H (P₂ (G z) (G x) (G y) f' g') =
  P₃ (H (G z)) (H (G x)) (H (G y)) (# H f') (# H g') ∥


    exact (lift_preserves_chosen_pullbacks_uptoeq_after_isotoid_induction f' g').
  Qed.

End LiftAlongWeakEquivalencePreservesChosenPullbacksUptoEquality.
